summary: Iteration 7 testing complete. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified: Dashboard merged with Analytics (5 summary cards, period selector with 6 options, Top Expenses bar chart, Expense Breakdown donut chart, Monthly Trend chart, Accounts section), Transactions page filters (type pills, search, advanced filters with Account/Category/Date range, Uncategorized option in Category dropdown, Clear filters button, X of Y count), Accounts page delete confirmation dialog with cascade info, Settings page Danger Zone with Reset All Data dialog requiring RESET confirmation, Analytics route removed from navigation.

issues: Shows blank page instead of redirecting to Dashboard - minor UX issue, route effectively removed

passed_tests: GET /api/analytics/summary returns all required fields (total_income, total_expense, net_savings, category_breakdown, monthly_trend, account_balances)
GET /api/analytics/summary with date range filter works
Category breakdown has required fields (category, amount, color, type)
GET /api/transactions returns list with all required fields
GET /api/transactions?account_id=xxx filters by account
DELETE /api/accounts/{id} returns message with transaction count deleted
DELETE /api/accounts/{nonexistent} returns 404
POST /api/reset-all-data requires authentication (401 without token)
GET /api/categories returns list for filtering
GET /api/accounts returns list
Dashboard: 5 summary cards (Balance, Income, Expenses, Net Savings, Savings Rate)
Dashboard: Period selector with 6 options (All Time, This Month, Last Month, This FY, Last FY, Custom Range)
Dashboard: Top Expenses bar chart visible
Dashboard: Expense Breakdown donut chart with category labels
Dashboard: Monthly Trend bar chart visible
Dashboard: Accounts section at bottom
Navigation: Analytics link removed
/analytics route: Shows blank page (route removed)
Transactions: Type filter pills (All, Credit, Debit) working
Transactions: Search input filters by description
Transactions: Toggle filters button shows advanced filters
Transactions: Advanced filters (Account, Category, Date From/To) visible
Transactions: Category dropdown includes 'Uncategorized' option
Transactions: Clear filters button appears when filters active
Transactions: Shows 'X of Y transactions' count
Accounts: Delete button opens confirmation dialog
Accounts: Delete dialog shows cascade info (account, transactions, sync history)
Accounts: Cancel button closes dialog without deleting
Accounts: Confirm delete actually deletes account
Settings: Danger Zone section visible
Settings: Reset All Data button opens dialog
Settings: Reset dialog lists what will be deleted
Settings: RESET confirmation input required
Settings: Confirm button enabled only after typing RESET
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_DeleteDialog_Account for delete dialog testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 verified all 4 major features: (1) Dashboard merged with Analytics - has 5 summary cards with data-testid (total-balance-card, total-income-card, total-expense-card, net-savings-card, savings-rate-card), period selector (data-testid='period-select'), charts (Top Expenses, Expense Breakdown, Monthly Trend), Accounts section. (2) Transactions filters - type pills (data-testid='filter-type-{all|credit|debit}'), search (data-testid='filter-search-input'), toggle filters (data-testid='toggle-filters-btn'), advanced filters (filter-account-select, filter-category-select, filter-date-from, filter-date-to), clear filters (data-testid='clear-filters-btn'). (3) Accounts delete - delete button (data-testid='delete-account-{id}'), cancel (data-testid='cancel-delete-btn'), confirm (data-testid='confirm-delete-account-btn'). (4) Settings Reset - button (data-testid='reset-all-data-btn'), input (data-testid='reset-confirm-input'), confirm (data-testid='confirm-reset-btn'). Analytics route removed from App.js - /analytics shows blank page.
